title: NoSQL Database Taxonomy & Big Data Storage Ecosystem
description: A visual classification of major NoSQL database types and their relationship to the broader Big Data storage landscape, illustrating their primary data models and use cases.
relationships: Big Data Storage Systems is the overarching category that encompasses NoSQL databases
Key-Value Stores, Document Stores, Column-Family Stores, and Graph Databases are all types of NoSQL databases that fall under the Big Data Storage Systems umbrella
Each NoSQL type uses a different data model optimized for specific scalability and performance needs
